documents.description: DECREE CHANGING NAME TO KELLY MAE CRUZ FILED BY PETITIONER CRUZ, KYLE

parties.name: CRUZ, KYLE 53 CONCORD ST SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-13-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Name Change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Leticia Petez. Petitioner was sworn and examined. Good cause appearing, the Court granted the decree changing name to Kelly Mae Cruz. Decree signed in open court.
